chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No. 524 of 2022 Applicant: Jawad Ahmed s/o Ghulam Siddique @ Roshan Ali, through Mr. Imran Ali Pirzada, advocate Respondent: The State, through Ms. Rahat Ehsan, Addl. Prosecutor General along with complainant Asmatullah s/o. Pista Jan, --------------- Date of hearing: 24.05.2022 Date of order: 24.05.2022 --------------- O R D E R ZAFAR AHMED RAJPUT, J:- Through instant Cr. Bail Application, applicant/ accused Jawad Ahmed s/o Ghulam Siddique @ Roshan Ali seeks pre-arrest bail in Crime No. 35 of 2019 registered under Section 489-F, 420, 34, P.P.C. at P.S. City Court, Karachi. His earlier bail application for the same relief bearing No. 812 of 2022 was dismissed by the learned Addl. Sessions Judge-VIII, Karachi-South vide order, dated 16.03.2022. He was admitted to interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order, dated 18.03.2022, now the matter is fixed for confirmation of interim bail or otherwise. 2. At the very outset, complainant files an affidavit to the effect that he has no objection on the confirmation of the interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant, as he has paid the amount of alleged cheque i.e. Rs.500,000.00. 3. The alleged offence is compoundable; hence, interim bail already granted to the applicant vide order dated 18.03.2022 is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. Cr. Bail Application stands disposed of. JUDGE Athar Zai
